root.name: 台儿庄战役 — 初始部署

unitSnapshots.name: 第21旅团 (坂本支队)
unitSnapshots.description: IJA 21st Infantry Brigade — Sakamoto Detachment. Approached Linyi from the east.

unitSnapshots.name: 30师 (张金照部)
unitSnapshots.description: 30th Division — Zhang Jinzhao. North of Taierzhuang, blocking Japanese approach from Yixian.

unitSnapshots.name: 31师 (池峰城部)
unitSnapshots.description: 31st Division — Chi Fengcheng. Core defender of Taierzhuang town. Elite unit with strong will.

unitSnapshots.name: 第10炮兵联队
unitSnapshots.description: IJA 10th Artillery Regiment. Heavy artillery support for the Taierzhuang assault.

unitSnapshots.name: 第33旅团 (濑谷支队)
unitSnapshots.description: IJA 33rd Infantry Brigade — Part of 10th Division. Attacked toward Taierzhuang from Yixian.

unitSnapshots.name: 第13师团 (荻洲立兵)
unitSnapshots.description: IJA 13th Division — Rippei Ogisu. Advanced from south via Bengbu toward Xuzhou. Southern pincer of the operation.

unitSnapshots.name: 华北方面军 (寺内寿一)
unitSnapshots.description: IJA North China Area Army — Hisaichi Terauchi. Overall command of Japanese forces in North China.

unitSnapshots.name: 115师 (东北军)
unitSnapshots.description: 115th Division — Northeast Army remnant. Assisted Linyi defense.

unitSnapshots.name: 第5炮兵联队
unitSnapshots.description: IJA 5th Artillery Regiment. Provided fire support for the Linyi attack.

unitSnapshots.name: 八路军115师 (林彪部)
unitSnapshots.description: 8RA 115th Division — Lin Biao. After Pingxingguan victory, positioned in southern Shanxi.

unitSnapshots.name: 第5战区 (李宗仁/白崇禧)
unitSnapshots.description: HQ 5th War Area — Li Zongren & Bai Chongxi. Overall command of Xuzhou campaign.

unitSnapshots.name: 第9旅团 (国崎登)
unitSnapshots.description: IJA 9th Infantry Brigade — Kunizaki Noboru. 5th Division's vanguard attacking Linyi.

unitSnapshots.name: 4师 (陈大庆部)
unitSnapshots.description: 4th Division — Chen Daqing. Deployed for flanking maneuver against Japanese rear.

unitSnapshots.name: 48师 (桂军)
unitSnapshots.description: 48th Division — Guangxi clique unit. Arrived as reinforcement.

unitSnapshots.name: 27师 (黄樵松部)
unitSnapshots.description: 27th Division — Huang Qiaosong. Deployed west of Taierzhuang, guarding flank.

unitSnapshots.name: 7师 (桂军)
unitSnapshots.description: 7th Division — Guangxi clique unit. Veteran of Northern Expedition.

unitSnapshots.name: 89师 (张雪中部)
unitSnapshots.description: 89th Division — Zhang Xuezhong. Attacked Japanese forces at Yixian on Mar 26, inflicting heavy casualties.

unitSnapshots.name: 122师 (王铭章部)
unitSnapshots.description: 122nd Division — Wang Mingzhang. Heroic last stand at Tengxian. Wang killed in action Mar 17.

unitSnapshots.name: 2师 (郑洞国部)
unitSnapshots.description: 2nd Division — Zheng Dongguo. Elite central army unit. Part of Tang Enbo's counterattack force.

unitSnapshots.name: 第5师团 (板垣征四郎)
unitSnapshots.description: IJA 5th Division — Seishiro Itagaki. Attacked from northeast via Linyi. Attempted to flank Taierzhuang.

unitSnapshots.name: 25师 (关麟征部)
unitSnapshots.description: 25th Division — Guan Linzheng. Key unit for the encirclement of Japanese 10th Division.

unitSnapshots.name: 124师 (孙震兼)
unitSnapshots.description: 124th Division — Sichuan troops. Fought at Tengxian alongside 122nd Division.

unitSnapshots.name: 第22集团军 (孙震部)
unitSnapshots.description: HQ 22nd Group Army — Sun Zhen. Sichuan troops. Defended Tengxian, suffered heavy losses.

unitSnapshots.name: 第21集团军 (廖磊部)
unitSnapshots.description: HQ 21st Group Army — Liao Lei. Guangxi troops. Reinforced from south.

unitSnapshots.name: 第20军团 (汤恩伯部)
unitSnapshots.description: HQ 20th Army Group — Tang Enbo. Main flanking/counterattack force. Equipped with artillery.

unitSnapshots.name: 八路军129师 (刘伯承部)
unitSnapshots.description: 8RA 129th Division — Liu Bocheng. Active in Shanxi-Hebei border region. Harassed Japanese supply lines.

unitSnapshots.name: 第10师团 (矶谷廉介)
unitSnapshots.description: IJA 10th Division — Rensuke Isogai. Main attacking force. Advanced south along Jinpu railway from Shandong.

unitSnapshots.name: 第59军 (张自忠部)
unitSnapshots.description: 59th Army — Zhang Zizhong. Rushed to reinforce Linyi. Launched night counterattacks on Japanese 5th Division.

unitSnapshots.name: 第2集团军 (孙连仲部)
unitSnapshots.description: HQ 2nd Army Group — Sun Lianzhong. Main defense at Taierzhuang.

unitSnapshots.name: 第44独立旅
unitSnapshots.description: 44th Independent Brigade. Reserve force stationed east of the town.

unitSnapshots.name: 第3集团军 (庞炳勋部)
unitSnapshots.description: HQ 3rd Army Group — Pang Bingxun. Defended Linyi against Japanese 5th Division.

unitSnapshots.name: 第8旅团 (濑谷启)
unitSnapshots.description: IJA 8th Infantry Brigade — Seya Kei. Spearheaded the attack on Taierzhuang. ~4000 men with tank support.

unitSnapshots.name: 59军38师
unitSnapshots.description: 38th Division — Part of Zhang Zizhong's 59th Army.

unitSnapshots.name: 39师 (庞炳勋兼)
unitSnapshots.description: 39th Division — Defended Linyi north gate. Blocked Itagaki's 5th Division advance.
